# Web cache: 2025 Nobel Prize Chemistry Kitagawa MOF metal organic frameworks breakthrough

> 时间: 2026-03-08 00:52


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

Oct 8, 2025 · Susumu Kitagawa , Richard Robson and Omar Yaghi are awarded the Nobel Prize in Chemistry 2025 . They have developed a new form of molecular architecture. In their constructions, metal ions function as cornerstones that are linked by long organic (carbon-based) molecules. Susumu Kitagawa , Richard Robson and Omar Yaghi have won the 2025 Nobel prize in chemistry for discovering and developing MOFs .
